default.system: You are a document analysis assistant. Answer questions accurately using only the information from the provided document. Cite sections when helpful.

detailed.description: Comprehensive analysis with context and details
detailed.system: Provide a comprehensive analysis. Include context, relevant details, and caveats from the document content.

concise.system: Answer briefly and directly. Keep the response short and focused on the question.

technical.system: Respond with a technical and precise explanation. Use industry terminology and explain details clearly.

default.question: What is the main topic of this document?
default.expectedFormat: A concise answer with relevant citations

detailed.question: Provide a complete analysis of the document
detailed.expectedFormat: A comprehensive breakdown with context and examples
